entries.title: observent
entries.description: Production-grade observability for multi-agent Python apps. Detects your framework (LangGraph, CrewAI, Microsoft Agent Framework, Anthropic Agents SDK, OpenAI Agents SDK, smolagents, LlamaIndex, Google ADK, or a Custom no-framework path) and wires up Arize Phoenix, Langfuse, SigNoz, Elastic APM, LangSmith, Opik, or Jaeger with correct span hierarchy, context propagation, and mandatory OTel/OpenInference attributes.

entries.title: typo3-site-conformance
entries.description: Source-of-truth conformance ruleset + self-contained checker for deployable TYPO3 v14 site/project repos (type:project + Docker/Compose): layout, containers, Concourse CI, supply-chain, secrets, Valkey/ofelia. The site/project counterpart to typo3-conformance.

When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks

entries.title: onekeys
entries.description: Expand single-character Claude Code prompts into full instructions via a UserPromptSubmit hook. Type c for Continue, h for /handoff:handoff, etc.; mappings live in ~/.claude/onekeyers.txt.

entries.title: cwd-safety
entries.description: Keeps the agent's Bash working directory at project root. A PreToolUse(Bash) hook blocks drift-inducing `cd` commands and any command run from a drifted cwd; a PostToolUse(Bash) hook warns when the working directory has changed.

entries.title: metaspace-membrane
entries.description: Deny-by-default agent membrane: a PreToolUse hook that keeps the coding agent inside a hardened .bio constitution (project-only writes, network host allowlist, dangerous-command block).

entries.description: Comprehensive SEO analysis skill for Claude Code. 20 core sub-skills covering technical SEO, content quality (E-E-A-T), schema markup, image optimization, sitemap architecture, AI search optimization (GEO), local SEO, maps intelligence, semantic topic clustering, search experience optimization (SXO), SEO drift monitoring, e-commerce SEO, international SEO with cultural profiles, and strategic planning across all industries.

entries.title: claude-obsidian
entries.description: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault. Covers memory management, session notetaking, knowledge organization, and agent context across projects. Based on Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern. Optional DragonScale Memory extension adds hierarchical log folds, deterministic page addresses, embedding-based semantic tiling lint, and boundary-first autoresearch topic selection.

entries.title: mattpocock-skills
entries.description: Composable agent skills for real engineering work — grilling, triage, TDD, PRDs, and productivity rituals from Matt Pocock.

entries.title: jstack
entries.description: jstack — a layered learn→plan→execute loop over 9 phases. Step 0 plans the task into a dependency-ordered checklist + a # LAYERS list; each layer walks all nine phases then advances to the next (frontend→…→deploy), only the last firing the ship promise. A semantic node-cache keys each node by a normalized token-set signature of its goal, so when a goal matches one settled on a prior walk the loop surfaces the prior result for reuse (skip) and fans out independent nodes in parallel. Mandatory podman containment: ship gates and witnesses run inside a memory-capped envelope (no host fallback). Contract-native: /contract substrate (aiko), default ship_gate, post-ship seal. In-place, multi-session, per-step grader, fib-harness adversarial pass on the verdict phase. Three harness adapters: Claude Code, Codex CLI, opencode.
